description: This is a Java test class for verifying Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) support in the AuthController of the BusinessLoanAPI Spring Boot application. It uses Spring's testing framework with MockMvc to simulate HTTP OPTIONS and POST requests to the /api/auth/register endpoint and checks for correct CORS headers and responses.

classes.name: test_auth_controller_cors_webmvc_test
classes.description: Unit test class for testing CORS preflight and POST response headers for the /api/auth/register endpoint in the AuthController. Ensures that CORS headers are properly included in responses.

methods.name: preflight_register_isAllowed
methods.description: Tests that the OPTIONS preflight request to /api/auth/register responds with appropriate CORS headers indicating allowed origin and credentials.

methods.name: post_register_includesCorsHeaders
methods.description: Tests that a POST request to /api/auth/register responds with the correct CORS headers and includes expected JSON response data.
